metadata.title: Meezan Plus Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Experience a new level of banking with the Meezan Plus Account, designed to meet all your financial needs. This comprehensive, current remunerative account is based on the Islamic principle of Mudarabah and is ideal for Individuals, Sole Proprietorships, Partnerships, and Companies.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print The account that gives you more! Experience a new level of banking with the Meezan Plus Account, designed to meet all your financial needs. This comprehensive, current remunerative account is based on the Islamic principle of Mudarabah and is ideal for Individuals, Sole Proprietorships, Partnerships, and Companies. Enjoy added benefits and a rewarding banking experience by maintaining a monthly average balance of Rs. 200,000 or more. With Meezan Plus, your banking goes beyond transactions - it becomes an elevated experience. Key Features & Benefits Free Debit Card upon Account Opening: Customer can select any one card from VISA Classic, VISA Gold, Mastercard Classic, or PayPak Card (One free primary card per account) Free Cheque Book, Free Payorders, Free Online Banking, Free Internet Banking, Free E-Statements Facility, Free Digital Transaction Alert Facility Profit will be calculated Daily Profit will be paid Monthly Standard Charges Apply (except for free Meezan Plus services) Zakat and Withholding Tax deducted as per regulations Minimum investment required for account opening is Rs. 1,000/- No Maximum investment limit No restriction on withdrawals or number of transactions Exclusive Perks Following waivers can be availed by Meezan Plus account holders who maintain Rs. 200,000 or above**: No annual fee on debit cards (Meezan PayPak Debit Card / Meezan VISA Silver Card / Meezan Mastercard Classic Card / Meezan VISA– Gold Debit Card) Free On-Demand Account Statements Free Intercity Clearing through NIFT No Charges on Stop Payment Requests Free SMS Alerts (all transactions) No Charges for Balance Maintenance Certificate / Account Maintenance Certificate No Charges on Payorder cancellation **System will check the balance of Rs. 200,000/- of the previous month only before applying the above charges. For example: If the annual fee of the card is applicable in the month of May, 2025, the system will check the average balance of April, 2025 only. In the first month of opening an account, customer will be eligible for the waiver of the above services if the account balance is at least Rs. 200,000/- at the time of the transaction. How Does the Meezan Plus Account Work? Upon agreeing to become a Meezan Plus Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal), and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the deposited funds. The Bank allocates these funds to a deposit pool; which is then utilized to provide financing to customers through Islamic modes, including but not limited to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna, and Diminishing Musharakah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 Products Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Meezan Plus Account Monthly 0.01 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Plus Account Monthly 0.13% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs) Want to Open Meezan Plus Account Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
